changeSet.author: pmanko
changeSet.comment: nce-012-add-dashboard-menu inserted a menu row via COALESCE(MAX(id),0)+1 instead of nextval('menu_seq'), leaving the sequence behind the actual max ID. Resync so subsequent nextval calls produce unused IDs.
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval('clinlims.menu_seq', COALESCE((SELECT MAX(id) FROM clinlims.menu), 0) + 1, false);
